name: regent_starter_plus_refine_blackhole_child_cloak_glimmer_bulwark_shortline
description: Shortline simulation for Regent A10 starter deck plus RefineBlade, BlackHole, ChildOfTheStars, CloakOfStars, Glimmer, and Bulwark.
assumptions: Starter deck uses the existing Regent A10 starter definition, including AscendersBane.
Chinese name mapping used: 铸造刀刃=RefineBlade, 黑洞=BlackHole, 群星之子=ChildOfTheStars, 群星斗篷=CloakOfStars, 微光=Glimmer, 筑墙=Bulwark.
Power cards use the current persistent-power simulation support for BlackHole and ChildOfTheStars.
Block, Weak, and enemy pressure use the current static valuation policy; encounter HP loss is not modeled.
